title: [CS] FNaF
description: A FNaF mod made for our own purposes, yet shared to the public due to the work & effort that went into it.
body:
# **[Description]**

Our Mod aims to bring the decorations & animatronics into Minecraft!

We have plans to add AI in the far future, as well as Fan Game animatronics!

This is one of our many mods, this one focusing on the Five Night's at Freddy's Franchise!

**Requires:**
Geckolib

## **[Developers]**

- Core Emperor **as the primary coder**
- Spring **as the primary asset designer**
- Kaitlyn & Yuki **as designers & artists, as well as occassional help on assets & code.**

### **[Socials]**

- [Discord Link](https://discord.gg/adnGN3ZnJ2)
